profile: Frontend Developer with over 5 years of experience crafting high-performance, accessible user interfaces for SaaS and B2B products. Built and shipped 10+ production applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript with consistently strong Lighthouse performance scores. Designed and maintained reusable component libraries adopted across multiple product teams, reducing frontend development time by 30%. Implemented AI-powered chat interfaces and real-time collaboration features using WebSocket connections. Delivered pixel-perfect, responsive designs with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, significantly reducing user-reported UI issues across projects.

projects.name: MakeMovie.ai – AI Multimedia Studio
projects.description: Full creative dashboard for generating AI-powered images, videos, avatars, fashion edits, and chat-assisted workflows from text prompts.
features: Built the interactive creative dashboard with real-time preview, drag-and-drop workflows, and responsive design
Implemented streaming chat interface for AI-assisted creative workflows with live generation progress
Designed and developed reusable component library for media editors, galleries, and prompt builders
Optimized frontend performance for handling large media assets with lazy loading and progressive rendering

projects.name: Motivational Alarm App
projects.description: AI-powered alarm that generates motivational stories (quotes + images) based on personal goals, using eye-detection to ensure the user is fully awake.
features: Developed the mobile-responsive UI for alarm configuration, goal setting, and story consumption
Built interactive eye-detection feedback interface with real-time camera integration and visual cues
Implemented animated transitions and micro-interactions for the motivational content display experience
Created responsive layouts for DALL-E generated images with dynamic content adaptation

projects.name: Tales of You – Personalized Storybook Generator
projects.description: AI storytelling platform turning selfies and prompts into personalized children's storybooks with custom characters, narration, and interactive flipbook reading.
features: Built the interactive flipbook reading experience with page animations, narration sync, and touch gestures
Developed the storybook creation wizard with multi-step forms, image upload, and real-time character preview
Implemented responsive design across devices for the storytelling and reading experiences
Integrated Stripe checkout flow with seamless frontend payment and order confirmation UI
